ast.name: textContent
ast.source: ✅ API key loaded from .env file (takes priority over SecretStorage)
ast.target: ✅ API 密钥已从 .env 文件加载（优先级高于 SecretStorage）

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: ⚠️ No statuses selected: sync will do nothing
ast.target: ⚠️ 未选择任何状态：同步将不会执行任何操作

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Use fallback priority (Writer → Editor → first contributor)
ast.target: 使用备用优先级（作者 → 编辑 → 第一位贡献者）

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 从以下位置获取您的 API 密钥：

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Store your API key in SecretStorage (recommended), or add it to a .env file in your vault root: HARDCOVER_API_KEY=your_key_here
ast.target: 将您的 API 密钥存储在 SecretStorage 中（推荐），或将其添加到您保险库根目录的 .env 文件中：HARDCOVER_API_KEY=your_key_here

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析模板 YAML 失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error extracting year from edition release date:
ast.target: 从版本发布日期提取年份时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error extracting year from book release date:
ast.target: 从书籍发布日期提取年份时出错：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pattern used to generate filenames. Available variables: {{bookId}}, {{editionId}}, {{bookTitle}}, {{editionTitle}}, {{bookAuthors}}, {{editionAuthors}}, {{bookYear}}, {{editionYear}}.
ast.target: 用于生成文件名的模式。可用变量：{{bookId}}, {{editionId}}, {{bookTitle}}, {{editionTitle}}, {{bookAuthors}}, {{editionAuthors}}, {{bookYear}}, {{editionYear}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which reading statuses to sync. Uncheck to exclude. All statuses synced by default.
ast.target: 选择要同步的阅读状态。取消勾选以排除。默认同步所有状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When provided, only books updated on Hardcover after this timestamp will be synced. Leave empty to sync your entire library. Example format: 2025-01-01T18:30:35.519934+00:00
ast.target: 提供此选项后，仅同步在此时间戳之后在 Hardcover 上更新的书籍。留空以同步整个库。示例格式：2025-01-01T18:30:35.519934+00:00

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Group your book notes into subdirectories for better organization
ast.target: 将您的书籍笔记分组到子目录中以获得更好的组织结构

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how to organize your books into directories
ast.target: 选择如何将您的书籍组织到目录中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to organize books with no 'Author' role
ast.target: 如何组织没有“作者”角色的书籍

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name for books with missing authors
ast.target: 缺少作者的书籍的名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to organize books with multiple 'Author' roles
ast.target: 如何组织具有多个“作者”角色的书籍

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name for books with multiple 'Author' roles
ast.target: 具有多个“作者”角色的书籍的名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically move notes to match your grouping settings on every sync (default behavior). Disable to keep notes where you've manually placed them. Note: manually renamed folders may result in split collections when new books are added.
ast.target: 每次同步时自动移动笔记以匹配您的分组设置（默认行为）。禁用此选项可将笔记保留在您手动放置的位置。注意：手动重命名的文件夹在添加新书时可能会导致合集拆分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format these fields as [[wikilinks]] both in frontmatter and note body
ast.target: 在 frontmatter 和笔记正文中将这些字段格式化为 [[wikilinks]]

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: ⚠️ For array fields like {{authors}}, {{contributors}}, {{series}}, {{publisher}}, {{genres}} and {{lists}}, use the Wikilinks settings below to enable [[wikilinks]] formatting. Writing [[{{authors}}]] in the template won't work as expected as they may contain multiple values.
ast.target: ⚠️ 对于像 {{authors}}, {{contributors}}, {{series}}, {{publisher}}, {{genres}} 和 {{lists}} 这样的数组字段，请使用下面的 Wikilinks 设置来启用 [[wikilinks]] 格式。在模板中编写 [[{{authors}}]] 不会按预期工作，因为它们可能包含多个值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep any additional properties you manually add to your notes (not in the template above).
ast.target: 保留您手动添加到笔记中的任何额外属性（不在上述模板中）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keep headings in the note even when the content below them is empty
ast.target: 即使下方内容为空，也保留笔记中的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to format quotes in the note body
ast.target: 如何格式化笔记正文中的引用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how Hardcover statuses appear in your notes
ast.target: 自定义 Hardcover 状态在您笔记中的显示方式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use 'Last Name, First Name' format for author folders
ast.target: 对作者文件夹使用“姓, 名”格式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保留额外的自定义属性

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 重置时间戳（将强制完全同步）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No reading statuses selected. Please select at least one status in settings, or select all to sync your entire library.
ast.target: 未选择任何阅读状态。请在设置中至少选择一个状态，或选择全部以同步整个库。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please specify a subfolder for your Hardcover books. Using the vault root is not supported.
ast.target: 请为您的 Hardcover 书籍指定一个子文件夹。不支持使用保险库根目录。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid timestamp format. Please use ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ) or leave empty.
ast.target: 时间戳格式无效。请使用 ISO 8601 格式（YYYY-MM-DD'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ）或留空。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No books found in your Hardcover library.
ast.target: 在您的 Hardcover 库中未找到任何书籍。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error syncing Hardcover library. Check console for details.
ast.target: 同步 Hardcover 库时出错。请检查控制台获取详细信息。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Template YAML syntax error. Check console for details or review YAML syntax in settings.
ast.target: 模板 YAML 语法错误。请检查控制台获取详细信息或在设置中检查 YAML 语法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sync a limited number of books to test the plugin before doing a full sync. Remember to change or reset the timestamp accordingly, if set.
ast.target: 在完整同步前，先同步有限数量的书籍以测试插件。请记得相应地更改或重置时间戳（如果已设置）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sync your Hardcover books to your notes. For testing, you can sync a limited number of books in the Debug section below.
ast.target: 将您的Hardcover书籍同步到笔记中。如需测试，您可以在下方的调试部分同步有限数量的书籍。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Template must start with --- followed by a newline
ast.target: 模板必须以 --- 开头，后跟换行符

ast.name: error
ast.source: Template must have closing --- delimiter with newlines before and after
ast.target: 模板必须包含闭合的 --- 分隔符，且其前后需有换行符

ast.name: text
ast.source: For large libraries (500+ books), sync may take several minutes due to Hardcover's API rate limits (60 requests/minute). The plugin will automatically pace requests to respect these limits.
ast.target: 对于大型书库（500+本书），由于Hardcover的API速率限制（每分钟60次请求），同步可能需要几分钟。插件将自动调整请求节奏以遵守这些限制。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Customize the structure of your notes including YAML frontmatter and body content. Do not remove the enclosing `---` from the frontmatter or the template will be invalid.
ast.target: 自定义笔记的结构，包括YAML前置元数据和正文内容。请勿移除前置元数据的 `---` 包裹符，否则模板将无效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ On each sync, the plugin regenerates note content using fresh data from Hardcover. Values in {{ }} placeholders are updated automatically. Custom properties you add to this template will appear in all notes. Personal notes added below the delimiter in individual note files are never modified.
ast.target: ⚠️ 每次同步时，插件会使用来自Hardcover的最新数据重新生成笔记内容。{{ }} 占位符中的值会自动更新。您添加到此模板的自定义属性将出现在所有笔记中。在单个笔记文件中，分隔符下方添加的个人笔记永远不会被修改。
